'''Shadowmoths''' were a type of [[moth]]. The resurrection of once-[[Death|dead]] [[Nightsister Zombie]]s from the pods in which the [[Nightsisters]] kept their bodies was comparable to the stirring of shadowmoths.<ref name="The Gilded Cage" />

{{Creature-stub}}
